ALL PARTIES ARE TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE AS AUTHORIZED BY THE CHIEF JUSTICE OF CALIFORNIA (STATEWIDE EMERGENCY ORDER OF 3/30/20.) COURT RESERVES JURISDICTION OVER ALL ISSUES PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF THE COURT. SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS IN RE: TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE.
